title: ToxicSkills: Snyk Finds Prompt Injection in 36% of Agent Skills
excerpt: Scanned 3,984 agent skills from ClawHub using the mcp-scan engine... 36.82% (1,467 skills) have at least one security flaw... 76 malicious payloads designed for credential theft and data exfiltration... hidden instructions, obfuscated commands, and credential exposure within SKILL.md documentation.
